Plan:
  + host.compose1.docker.apt.repository["docker-official"]
    manage docker official apt repository
    source: ../../../examples/v2-docker-compose.dbf.hcl:13:host.compose1.docker
    + content
      @@ -1,0 +1,6 @@

      + URIs: https://download.docker.com/linux/debian
      + Suites: trixie
      + Components: stable
      + Architectures: amd64
      + Signed-By: /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
    + ensure: "present"
    + group: "root"
    + mode: "0644"
    + name: "docker-official"
    + owner: "root"
    + path: "/etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker_official.sources"

  + host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].directory
    create docker compose directory /opt/app
    source: ../../../examples/v2-docker-compose.dbf.hcl:16:host.compose1.docker.compose["app"]
    + ensure: "present"
    + group: "root"
    + mode: "0755"
    + owner: "root"
    + path: "/opt/app"

    manage docker compose env file app

    + group: "root"

  + host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].project
    converge docker compose project app
    source: ../../../examples/v2-docker-compose.dbf.hcl:16:host.compose1.docker.compose["app"]
    + directory: "/opt/app"
    + env_files
      + env_files.0: "/opt/app/.env"
    + files
      + files.0: "/opt/app/compose.yaml"
    + name: "app"
    + project: "app"
    + pull: "missing"
    + recreate: "auto"
    + remove_orphans: false
    + state: "running"
  + host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].service
    manage docker compose service debianform-compose-app
    source: ../../../examples/v2-docker-compose.dbf.hcl:16:host.compose1.docker.compose["app"]
    + enabled: true
    + name: "debianform-compose-app"
    + state: "running"
    + unit: "debianform-compose-app.service"
  + host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].systemd_unit
    create docker compose systemd unit debianform-compose-app.service
    source: ../../../examples/v2-docker-compose.dbf.hcl:16:host.compose1.docker.compose["app"]
    + content
      @@ -1,0 +1,15 @@
      + [Unit]
      + Description=DebianForm Compose Project app
      + Requires=docker.service
      + After=docker.service network-online.target
      +
      + [Service]
      + Type=oneshot
      + RemainAfterExit=yes
      + WorkingDirectory=/opt/app
      + ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker compose -p app -f /opt/app/compose.yaml up -d
      + ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker compose -p app -f /opt/app/compose.yaml stop
      + TimeoutStartSec=0
      +
      + [Install]
      + WantedBy=multi-user.target
    + ensure: "present"
    + group: "root"
    + mode: "0644"
    + name: "debianform-compose-app.service"
    + owner: "root"
    + path: "/etc/systemd/system/debianform-compose-app.service"
    + summary
      + summary.bytes: 385
      + summary.sha256: "6cd6cbb3f51b6cd295517fa585d8573a31c5d55879472513038c5329b490072a"

    + ensure: "absent"
    + packages

      + packages.3: "podman-docker"
      + packages.4: "containerd"
      + packages.5: "runc"
    + remove_conflicts: "auto"

    + enabled: true
    + name: "docker"
    + state: "running"
    + unit: "docker.service"
  ! host.compose1.apt.cache_refresh
    refresh apt package cache
    triggered_by: host.compose1.docker.apt.signing_key["docker-official"], host.compose1.docker.apt.repository["docker-official"]
    command: apt-get update
  ! host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].daemon_reload
    reload systemd manager configuration
    triggered_by: host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].systemd_unit
    command: systemctl daemon-reload
  ! host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].validate
    validate docker compose project app
    triggered_by: host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].file, host.compose1.docker.compose["app"].env_file["app"]
    command: docker compose -p app -f /opt/app/compose.yaml config

Summary: 15 create, 0 update, 0 delete, 0 no-op, 3 operations
